title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Arima Kinen, Vodka decides to make
time to run in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka makes a bet with Daiwa Scarlet before the
race. Daiwa Scarlet suggests that the winner be
crowned the queen, and the loser has to do
whatever the queen says.
